This will permanently delete the pre-upg: This will permanently delete the pre-upgrade MySQL backup. You will no longer be able to rollback. Only do this if the upgrade is confirmed stable.

This will restore the previous MySQL ver: This will restore the previous MySQL version and data from the backup. The database will be unavailable during the rollback.
